title: SVC for Lunar Client
description: A light-weight modpack to jump straight into a world with friends, using Simple Voice Chat, on Lunar Client.
body:
# SVC for Lunar Client **SVC for Lunar Client** is a lightweight modpack that allows you to use Simple Voice Chat on Lunar Client. _Note: We recommend using [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download) to gain the best experience while using this modpack, however it can be launched on any modpack loader._ ## Modpack Content * **Simple Voice Chat**: A working voice chat in Minecraft. * **Sodium**: Modern rendering engine which greatly improves performance. * **Iris**: Modern shaders mod for Minecraft, compatible with OptiFine shader packs. * **Fabric API**: Adds common hooks and intercompatibility measures. * **Mod Menu**: Adds a mod menu to view an in-game list of all the mods you have installed. ## FAQ
How do I install the SVC modpack on Lunar Client?
Here are the five easy steps you need to take!
### Step 1: Download Lunar Client [![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/edcac7cc5f-lunar-client-download-grid.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/download) ### Step 2: Select "Versions" on the Lunar Client Launcher [![Lunar Client Launcher](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/bbe073a641-launcher-versions-tab.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 3: Click "Modpacks" on the top of the page [![Lunar Client Modpacks](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/13915e6116-lunarclient-modpacks-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 4: Install your modpack of choosing, in this case the SVC for Lunar Client Modpack. [![Lunar Client Modpack Installer](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/b880040165-launcher-install-play.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 5: Click "Launch Game" after the install is complete! [![Lunar Client Launch Button](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/42725ba855-launcher-mods-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client)

Connect with fellow SVC enthusiasts and stay in the loop with latest updates in our [Discord](https://lunarclient.com/discord).
